title: alsine verna subsp. gerardi
intro: Alsine verna subsp. gerardi, also known as Alsine gerardi, is a sub-species of the Alsine verna plant, which is a flowering plant in the carnation family. It is commonly found in Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney and urinary issues. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote urine production. Alsine verna subsp. gerardi is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can be used to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other related conditions.
